description_long: This is a small, simple cabin with a rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched, dark brown gable roof. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in wood or plaster, and the structure sits alone on a flat, circular base. The cabin features minimal architectural detailing, with no visible ornamentation or trim. There are no visible windows or doors on any side, giving it a very plain and utilitarian appearance. The roof overhangs slightly on all sides, providing some protection to the walls below.
description: A compact, light-walled cabin with a steep dark gable roof and no visible windows or doors, set on a flat circular base.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from an angle showing the front gable and one side wall, both plain and unadorned.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the long, featureless wall and the full expanse of the dark gable roof.
description_view_2: The rear gable and opposite side wall are visible, mirroring the simplicity of the front.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wall and roof with no openings.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a steep pitch and slight overhangs, covered in dark material
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side of the cabin
attribute_door_placement: No exterior doors are visible on any side of the cabin
